case_title: OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC VS. MAURICE M ROUEDE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC SERVED JUL-15-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUEDE, MAURICE M ROUEDE, ROSALYN MENG, LIXIA LI
